name: How to Stir Fry- p Cooking Class
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare all ingredients ahead of time, cutting them into uniform pieces and having seasonings ready.
2. Heat a wok or skillet over high heat until very hot; you should hear a sizzle when water droplets are added.
3. Add enough oil to coat the bottom and sides of the pan.
4. Use a wire mesh spoon for stir-frying in a wok, or a spoon that reaches all areas of the skillet for stir-frying over a flame.
5. Add ingredients in the specified order and continuously stir them.
6. For some recipes, add liquid and briefly cover; for others, finish frying and serve immediately.
